title: SQL JOINs Explained
notes: Deep dive into INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, and FULL joins. Practice merging tables.

title: SQL GROUP BY & HAVING
notes: Grouping rows using aggregate functions (SUM, AVG, COUNT, MIN, MAX). HAVING operates on groups.

title: Window Functions
notes: OVER(), PARTITION BY, ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), DENSE_RANK(), and LAG()/LEAD().

title: Common Table Expressions (CTEs)
notes: Using `WITH query_name AS (...)` to structure and simplify complex nested subqueries.

title: SQL Indexes & Query Tuning
notes: B-Tree indexes, execution plans (EXPLAIN), scan types (Index vs. Seq Scan), and performance.
